title: Article 35 Order No. 1 of 2024 against Batelco
summary: Enforcement order relating to Batelco’s breach of Articles 24 and 43 of the Telecommunications Law and its Individual Mobile Telecommunications Licence.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.licensing: Order concerning Batelco breach of Telecommunications Law and mobile licence.
